scene.message: Maki: We have to restore{nl} the town.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: To think Kandori{nl} can use a Persona too...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We've no time to{nl} dawdle in a place like this.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We've no time to{nl} dawdle in a place like this.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Let's go give Kandori{nl} a thrashing!{waitkey}C'mon, hurry~!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: So Kandori had{nl} the butterfly dream too?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: As long as I'm here,{nl} Kandori's got no future.{waitkey}Dehyahyahyahya!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: So Kandori had{nl} the butterfly dream too, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I wonder if Kandori{nl} had the butterfly dream too?{waitkey}{ret}
